title: Refined Polymorphism
body:
An add-on mod providing [Polymorph](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph) support for the Crafting and Pattern Grid from [Refined Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/refined-storage), adding Polymorph's recipe selection button to these grids in order to choose between conflicting crafting recipes instead of being forced to work with only one of these conflicting recipes within RS.

Also provides optional integration with [Refined Storage Addons](https://modrinth.com/mod/refined-storage-addons), [Reborn Storage](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rebornstorage) and [Universal Grid](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/universal-grid).
